programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Your Feet, Your Foundation
programme.desc: Exercising barefoot, Mary Ann emphasizes somatosensory awareness in the feet.

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/ The Butler Did It
programme.desc: When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: What's a Satellite/ Satellite Selfie
programme.desc: Jet decides to fly up to space and see what the problem is with a broken communications satellite.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Animal Rescue Crew/ Nature of Dreams
programme.desc: When Nature Cat and his pals spend the day playing Wild Animal Rescue, they come across a little baby fox with a cut on its front paw.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: Stormy Waters/ Scoot on Over!
programme.desc: When a big storm passes over Reeftown the friends learn they don't need to be afraid of rain.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Fiddle of Nowhere/ A Splash of Mink
programme.desc: Oscar has dreamed about participating in Qyah’s annual fiddle festival and becoming a champion fiddler like his idol, Finnegan King. Molly and Trini can’t wait to get their jig on at the Qyah Tribal Hall, but on the way, they run into a mink.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Johann Sebastian Bach/ I Am Marie Curie
programme.desc: Xavier goes back in time to meet Johann Sebastian Bach and practice for the school talent show.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Didgeridoo and Carmen Too/ Not Home on the Range
programme.desc: After Carmen misplaces a didgeridoo, she discovers that making a new one isn't as easy at it looks; Leo wants to ride with his uncle in Sydney, but must overcome his fear of horses.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Circus Problem/ The Buried Treasure Problem
programme.desc: Peg and Cat measure their way to buried treasure using Cat as a measuring stick!

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Friends Say No/ Prince Wednesday Doesn't Want to Play
programme.desc: Daniel learns that sometimes his friends may not want to play and he can find things to do on his own.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Fixing X
programme.desc: Big Bird and Snuffy are the hosts of "The Letter of the Day Show" on Sesame Street and learn all about how the letter "X" can come at the end of a word.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Gnome More Nonsense/ Space Dancing
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and Peter are thrilled when they find Norman the Garden Gnome living in their backyard.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pastry
programme.desc: See how eight bakers handle three types of pastry. For the signature, it’s breakfast time, Danish style. Then, the technical is a classic British tart. The bite-size showstopper is a pastry notoriously difficult to make and even trickier to bake.

programme.title: Mister Rogers: It's You I Like
programme.desc: Cast members from the groundbreaking series share their personal perspectives and insights in this new production, which pays tribute to television's longest-running children's series.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: My Mother and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Learn how Rose meets Capt. Dreyfuss. Emma goes on a date and incites an international incident. Rose defends an airman.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: New Year's
programme.desc: Bob Ralston makes New Year's Eve a family affair with his wife, daughter and grandson. The Welk Band plays Champagne Waltz while Lawrence dances with Norma Zimmer and Jo Ann Castle gets the party going.

programme.title: NCIS: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: The international manhunt for Eli David's killer turns into a federal witch hunt against Gibbs and the team, which questions their unconventional methods and threatens their future at the agency.

programme.title: NCIS: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
programme.desc: An explosion at a D.C. event that results in a casualty connected to the agency changes Parsons' perspective on Gibbs and the NCIS team. Meanwhile, without badges, DiNozzo and McGee investigate the case as civilians.

programme.title: NCIS: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: The NCIS cyber case turns into a united global effort after evidence confirms The Calling, an international terrorist group that recruits children through the Internet, has been purchasing S-bombs off the black market.

programme.title: NCIS: Neverland
programme.desc: NCIS feverishly investigates a global terrorist group that is recruiting teens via the internet following a deadly bombing overseas that results in an emotional and surprising loss for the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Scope
programme.desc: The NCIS team re-examines an ambush on a group of Special Ops snipers in Iraq after an American couple is attacked in the same area six months later. When Gibbs needs the account of the lone survivor, he tries to connect with him at Walter Reed Medical.

programme.title: NCIS: Keep Your Friends Close
programme.desc: After the body of a missing navy commander is found, Vance orders Gibbs and the team to work with former FBI Agent Fornell. Also, Bishop and Torres interview a convicted investment advisor, when the victim is linked to his highly publicized trial.

programme.title: NCIS: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: NCIS strikes a deal with a convicted murderer giving him a 48-hour furlough at his former residence, now McGee's home, in exchange for information that can convict his former cellmate, the murderer who deceived Gibbs and Fornell.

programme.title: NCIS: Death From Above
programme.desc: The NCIS headquarters are evacuated after bomb materials and a body are discovered on the roof above the squad room. Also, the team reads the first draft of Ducky's book.

programme.title: NCIS: One Step Forward
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder as she believes the local authorities convicted the wrong man. Also, Abby is awarded a dinner reservation to a new five-star restaurant, and must decide who to invite.

programme.title: NCIS: Two Steps Back
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman’s latest target, the team must search through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Tensions between Voight and Antonio builds as Internal Affairs digs into a murder case which potentially involves Voight's son.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Different Mistakes
programme.desc: Voight is assigned to a new Internal Affairs handler, Stillwell, who proves to be suspicious of Voight's actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Material Witness
programme.desc: A case hits close to home when the intelligence unit takes on a gang shooting with one living witness.

programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the strangely theatrical crime scene of another victim left by serial killer Paul Millander. After discovering that all of his victims were born in the same month as Grissom, Gil realizes that Millander could be after him.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Field of Fire
programme.desc: The team searches for a former marine and expert sniper who escaped a veteran's hospital when they discover his connection to the leader of an extremist group.

programme.title: NCIS: Once a Hero
programme.desc: The team investigates when an honoured marine veteran falls to his death at a hotel. After determining his death was not a suicide, the team discovers that he was homeless but living at the hotel with the help of a maintenance man who was a fellow vet.

programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'Miss Christmas,' the official tree finder for the Radcliffee tree lighting, is left desperate to find the perfect tree. A letter sends her to a small town and a man who doesn't want to part with this tree.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor returns home for Christmas and reunites with old friends and family and is asked to take over her dad's old practice. The doctor must now choose between a new life and an old one.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland
programme.desc: A woman brings her kids with her on a business trip to Memphis so they can go to Graceland. While there, she bumps into an old flame from her singing days in college. Together they make beautiful holiday music.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After his marriage to Aaliyah is annulled, R. Kelly continues to soar on top of the charts. A talented choreographer becomes the new Mrs. Kelly in a secret ceremony.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Sex Tape Scandal
programme.desc: As journalists uncover a trail of lawsuits and confidential settlements concerning underage girls, an underground sex tape emerges that puts R. Kelly in a compromising position.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: The People vs. R. Kelly
programme.desc: R. Kelly goes to trial in Chicago on multiple counts of child pornography for his alleged participation in a sex tape involving a minor.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: All the Missing Girls
programme.desc: Parents of girls in R. Kelly's camp accuse him of keeping them psychologically and sexually imprisoned. One mother fights to get her daughter back, and wins.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Black Girls Matter
programme.desc: As other major public figures fall from grace, women's groups come forward to take aim against the sexually brazen superstar. R. Kelly's time may finally be up.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Part II: The Reckoning: It Hasn't Stopped
programme.desc: As the world reels from the release of Surviving R. Kelly, a gun threat wreaks havoc at the premiere.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Part II: The Reckoning: The Settlement Factory

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Wojcik Family
programme.desc: The Wojcik family's home continues to undergo much needed renovations.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Toni Braxton
programme.desc: The story of Braxton's childhood, meteoric rise to fame, financial and health struggles and ultimate triumph over adversity, featuring interviews with Toni Braxton and her family, L.A. Reid Babyface, David Foster, and Diane Warren.

programme.title: Movie: Toni Braxton: Unbreak My Heart
programme.desc: Follow the singer’s journey from her discovery to her battle with Lupus, how she made it through her public divorce and dealt with her son’s autism and family struggles. The film chronicles the measures she took to make herself and her family whole again.

programme.title: Movie: Just Wright
programme.desc: A physical therapist falls for the basketball player she is helping recover from an injury.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: A male FBI agent goes undercover as an oversized, irritable grandmother named Big Momma.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Secret Lives and Alibis
programme.desc: When Ann Huxley learns that her ex-husband has been found dead in the warehouse where he works, a deadly get-rich-quick scheme begins to unravel.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Missouri Flood Zone Move
programme.desc: The Raneys remember one of the most challenging rescues of their lives where they built a dam and planned an entire cabin move for a Missouri family in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Testing the Dam
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty remember when they moved an entire cabin into a flood zone all in the name of testing a new dam.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Hydropower to the People
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty recall the time they embarked on an ambitious off-grid hydropower system after Tennessee storms take out a homestead's power source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Fast Action on the Homestead
programme.desc: The Raneys remember the time their own homestead fell into disrepair, requiring fast action to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Crisis Calls
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys turn a homestead on the verge of going up in flames into a golden opportunity. Later they race to Louisiana to protect a family under threat of vicious storms, black mold and feral hogs.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Savage Wilderness
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most grueling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Crisis Calls
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys turn a homestead on the verge of going up in flames into a golden opportunity. Later they race to Louisiana to protect a family under threat of vicious storms, black mold and feral hogs.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Savage Wilderness
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most grueling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw
programme.desc: The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season. Dustin invents a custom super claw to remove massive boulders from his plunge pool. Fred and his crew are confronted by a deadly cable malfunction.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Nugget Heaven
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt hits bedrock and a pile of nuggets at Rainbow's End. Fred chases the gold upstream into a dangerous new spot, forcing him to rethink his plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind
programme.desc: Parker questions the ground he's mining and his new foremen. Tony makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment. Then, the Dakota Boys work together in the hunt for gold in Alaska's raging waters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Bucket
programme.desc: Parker commands a huge engineering challenge to his team. Rick makes a huge upgrade to his operation. Mike and Monica team-up. At the start of the season, the Dakota Boys split up in their hunt for gold in the raging white waters of the Chilkat mountains.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Motherlode Mountain
programme.desc: Rick must decide whether to mine gold or put his new washplant together. Parker tests his new co-foreman.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mic Drop Pop!
programme.desc: Josh has a large knot on his head resulting from a car crash from 18 years ago. Brittney is covered in mysterious bumps. TJ has a hard, curious lump protruding from his side. Luis has a bump on his shoulder and his daughters fear it's dangerous.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Countdown to the New Season
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off his arm, Brandon has several lumps on his head and Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Countdown to the New Season
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off his arm, Brandon has several lumps on his head and Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Groomzilla
programme.desc: Mykelti, her moms and her fiancé Tony go dress shopping and he's very opinionated. Then the sister wives go see the B and B that Meri wants to buy in Utah, but worry it will pull her away. Later, Madison shows up with big news, leaving Janelle in tears.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Wanda
programme.desc: Wanda is a therapist who's trapped in a cycle of bland, unsexy and colorless style.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Sarah W.
programme.desc: Sarah is a 26-year-old athletic trainer with brains, beauty and a promising future. The only problem is Sarah doesn't see it.

programme.title: My Deadly Appetite
programme.desc: Born with Prader Willi, a rare incurable syndrome, Will feels starved constantly and has bouts of physical aggression. At 280lbs and kicked out of school, an intense inpatient treatment program hundreds of miles from home may be his only hope.

programme.title: My Skin Is Killing Me
programme.desc: In Alabama, 5 year old Payton has a rare skin condition known as epidermolysis bullosa that's slowly killing him. Meanwhile in China, 22 year old Cheng has been dealing with a mysterious skin condition causing fish-like scales to grow all over his body.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I'm a Rockstar, Baby!
programme.desc: As the lead singer of one of Canada's most famous rock bands, Kelly Jay has lived quite a life and he has collected a massive hoard to prove it.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Surviving on Trash
programme.desc: Pregnant with her first, Traci wants to move back into her childhood home, but it's filled floor to ceiling with her mother's stuff.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Erica's Story
programme.desc: At 661 lbs, Erica regrets not keeping a promise to her mom. She hopes her siblings will help but they are reluctant based on her past failures. Each meal threatens Erica's worst fear coming true; dying the same way she lives, alone and surrounded by food.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Old Gussy's Back
programme.desc: After his breakup call with Lisa, Gus wastes no time getting back in the game and bringing girls over to the beach house. Nilsa and the other roommates try to figure out how to release Kortni from her tonsil demons.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Hog Senses
programme.desc: Gus's recent breakup leaves his and Nilsa's status unclear. Things get complicated when Nilsa brings a new guy home from the bar and Gus gets jealous. When Jeremiah tries to diffuse the situation, he finds himself smack in the middle of drama.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Bro-ke Up
programme.desc: The roommates witness the epic bromance breakdown between Jeremiah and Gus. The ladies try to separate themselves from the drama, but end up deep in their own. Gus sets his sites on Jeremiah's girl.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Floribama Pride
programme.desc: Nilsa is attracted to a girl that Jeremiah brings home from the bar. The housemates attend the St. Pete Pride Festival, where they meet up with Gus's old friend Mattie, with whom Jeremiah unexpectedly strikes up a friendship.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Check Please
programme.desc: The roommates rally around Aimee as she prepares for her upcoming court date in PCB. Mattie decides to stay at the beach house for a bit longer. A friendly game of dodgeball turns ugly when Gus and Jeremiah come to blows at dinner.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: The Bird Has Landed
programme.desc: James and Ashleigh grow closer, but there is a nasty surprise on their date that will change things forever. Kieran sets his sights on Olivia, but Gina is not giving up on her man easily. Megan decides there is someone in the villa she can't stand.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony and Marq
programme.desc: Anthony is a veteran who met Marq online, but it seems like Marq may be hiding something.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Shakinah and Chris
programme.desc: After chatting for years with Chris, Shakinah needs to move forward with her love life. But when Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford find out that Chris is a huge pop star, they know Shakinah needs their help in more ways than one.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven and Samm
programme.desc: Steven is about to graduate high school and instead of planning for college, he wants to move to California and support his online love, Samm. Steven's mom is highly sceptical of Samm's identity and asks Nev and Max to find out.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Catherine and Graham
programme.desc: Long Islander Catherine has fallen deeply in love with country boy Graham from Tennessee. She's ready to uproot her life to be a country girl with him, but Nev and Max uncover that Graham's not everything he claims to be.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha and Jacqueline
programme.desc: Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Oceanna and Nelly
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods investigate the mystery of Oceanna and her enigmatic, online stalker, Nelly. When Oceanna’s ex-girlfriend Kira becomes involved though, the team are left wondering who is a victim and who is the perpetrator.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Kristen
programme.desc: Mike and Kristen met on Facebook but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robert and Ashleigh

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Find out what happened when a scorpion got loose during magic rehearsal, what money truck sent the crew scrambling and what fruity trick had a British influence.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation
programme.desc: Find out which trick left a producer with a wasp sting, and why several crew members left with headaches. Plus, find out why Michael wore a vest two sizes too small.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Turn to Gold
programme.desc: Find out what trick Michael loves to perform at parties and which trick was inspired by his fascination with superhero movies. Plus, learn the name of his favorite wig.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 2
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15

programme.title: The Misery Index: You Better Watch Your Filthy Mouth

programme.title: The Misery Index: How Did It Get in There?
programme.desc: Learn about the dumbest way to break up with someone and the gross dream that Sal needs to 'soldier forward' from. Then, a pantless performer and a vertical face planter go all out to be masters of misery.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New York
programme.desc: In the season premiere, reality star Tiffany 'New York' Pollard hopes the doctors can fix her botched boobs. Paul reconstructs a severely burned chin and the doctors meet a transgender woman whose face was pumped with cement.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: Supa Fupa
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynecologist did her tummy tuck, Paul performs a reconstructive rhinoplasty on a woman who's been teased about her nose since childhood, and a Brazilian human seeks the doctors' help for botched chest implants.

programme.title: Botched: Foreign Bodies
programme.desc: Rajee is back and the doctors attempt to fix her cement-filled face. Terry performs surgery on a woman whose nipples are too high, and an 'out-of-this-world' patient wants to look like an alien.

programme.title: Botched: Welcome to Jurassic Schnoz
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts, while Dr. Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Golden Globes Special: E!’s Inside Guide
programme.desc: We're counting down to one of Hollywood's biggest night with an A-list celebration. From Brad Pitt to Jennifer Aniston and of course, Jennifer Lopez, we're spotlighting the biggest names taking over the red carpet.

programme.title: Movie: Dear John
programme.desc: While on leave, a soldier returns to his hometown where he falls in love with a student. Once the soldier returns to the army, they attempt to continue their relationship.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Four Women and a Funeral
programme.desc: Charlotte falls for a recently widowed man and Carrie mends some fences with Mr. Big.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Cheating Curve
programme.desc: Carrie gets back with Mr. Big; Charlotte is swept away with the 'Power Lesbian' elite.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Chicken Dance
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for Miranda's friend and her interior decorator.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Lost Voice and Half-Baked
programme.desc: Khloé helps Rannella with her confidence and weight, and Brittany with her addictions.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Muscle Cub and the DUFF
programme.desc: Khloe and her team of experts help Will with his weight and Stephanie with her confidence.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Model, Interrupted and The Basic Bitch
programme.desc: After a life-changing accident that left her immobile, Kelsey Rose has had her career destroyed. A team is called in to help Kelsey shred the victim mentality and get back on the runway.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Invisible Girl/ Living a Lie
programme.desc: Having long battled her weight, Hollywood publicist Melissa is used to feeling invisible and constantly in the shadows of her clients. Now, it's Melissa's turn to shine.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Untying the Knot and Giraffically Sexy
programme.desc: Tiffany's pending divorce turns her world upside down, but Khloé and her team transform her pain into gain and help her find true love along the way. Later, Khloé helps Jamie, who has been criticized for her appearance for as long as she can remember.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Web of Lies and Mommy Issues
programme.desc: Ken created an alter-ego of himself in order to survive his difficult past.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Hungry for Love and The Fighter
programme.desc: Kay has been closed to love since her husband left her after the loss of their unborn child and turned to food as her companion. Javier takes his street fighting skills to the boxing ring to make his family proud after leaving a violent gang.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Twins and the Bullied Brother
programme.desc: After losing both parents by their teens, twins Ashley and Amber turned to food to cope. Logan was bullied for being overweight by his older brother, which in turn led him down a path that ended in injury and weight gain.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: 'Jojo Rabbit' star Roman Griffin Davis stops by to talk about his Golden Globe nomination. Then, certified dating coach Damona Hoffman gives a tutorial on how to makeover your dating profile.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Softball Sweethearts and Former Footballer
programme.desc: In an attempt to save their relationship, Sam and Nicole try to lose weight together, but Sam doubts Nicole's commitment to shaping up. Dexter is tired of his man-boobs and wants to shut his taunting athletic father up by getting back into the shape.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Revenge-ance and Uber-Entitled
programme.desc: Khloe helps Jill rediscover her true self; Sukhda tries to prove friends and family wrong.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Becoming Amy and From Scrawny to Brawny
programme.desc: Amy had a wake-up call when she and her daughter were kicked off an amusement park ride due to her size. Eddie's first love cheated on him with "buffer" men and he went into a spiral of self-hate and body shame.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Tame the Flame
programme.desc: Chopped judge Scott Conant and actress Busy Phillips have their sights set on beating Bobby Flay! They pit Toronto chef Ivana Raca against New Orleans chef Tom Wolfe, with both chefs fighting to make their mark.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hold On For One More Flay
programme.desc: Bobby is not safe when Carnie Wilson joins up with her teammate from "The Kitchen", Katie Lee. They bring in from Philly, Jeremy Nolen as he battles against Indian grill master, Vijay Sadhu for a chance to go up against Iron Chef, Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rotten Tomatoes for Bobby
programme.desc: Chopped judge Scott Contant and actress Helene Yorke are out for blood. Chefs Andre Fowles and Darren Saypharaj battle to get to Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sea Shells By the Sea Shore
programme.desc: Style walks into the kitchen when Harlem's very own Marcus Samuelsson and Los Angeles' finest Michael Voltaggio arrive to conquer Mount Flay. They're counting on dim sum master Ed Harris or seafood connoisseur Jason McLeod to help get to the top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF vs. Chopped
programme.desc: Chop chop Mr. Flay! Food Network's Ted Allen is turning the tables in Bobby Flay's kitchen and he's got the Chopped dream team to back him up.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Knockout
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio play referee in a match to take Bobby Flay down. Entering the arena with their eye on the prize is San Antonio's Chef Geronimo Lopez and Philippines native Chef Frances Tariga.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Fight at Filomena's
programme.desc: Robert Irvine heads to Costa Mesa, CA., to help turn around the struggling Filomena's Italian Kitchen and Market. Despite a clean kitchen, an organized dining room and allegedly good food, the fiery owner, Linda, hasn't been able to pay herself a dime.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: A Failing Restaurant Is No Laughing Matter
programme.desc: It was no joke in 2014 when Robert Irvine first visited Uncle Andy’s in Portland, Maine, and learned that comic Dennis Fogg and his wife Tina couldn’t even pay themselves. Robert returns to see who stepped up to manage the diner.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cleaning Up in Mississippi
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine has his work cut out for him when he arrives in Ridgeland, Mississippi. Rossini's Cucina Italiana is filthy, and even worse, owners Lori and Toni seem to have given up. Robert rolls up his sleeves and prepares to get his hands dirty.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Winter Win-derland
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon gets some help from the winter solstice and the chillingly hilarious entrepreneur Bethenny Frankel as they try to frost Bobby Flay out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Break a Plate!
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss. Rachael Ray and Damaris Phillips determine who has the sauce to take on the boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine has his work cut out for him when he arrives in Ridgeland, Mississippi. Rossini's Cucina Italiana is filthy, and even worse, owners Lori and Toni seem to have given up. Robert rolls up his sleeves and prepares to get his hands dirty.

programme.title: Chopped: There Will Be Bloody Marys
programme.desc: The chefs find a fancy cake and bloody Mary in the first basket. Then in entree round, the three chefs must create dished from ground chicken and seafood paella.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: To the Nth
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is taking some of her favorite recipes over the top! Her mac and cheese stuffed peppers are beer-battered and served with cilantro lime cream and her grilled French toast is finished with grilled strawberries.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Mary Poppins Show
programme.desc: Ina Garten hosts an incredible Mary Poppins reunion sharing cooking secrets and making a British-style Sunday lunch for her friends who produced, directed and acted in the new movie. She shows Emily Blunt her foolproof roasted capon recipe.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Barefoot Bistro
programme.desc: Ina demystifies the French classics plus table settings and the secrets to French pate.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Easy High Low
programme.desc: Ina Garten loves mixing fancy and casual fare, and she's sharing her secrets to this winning mashup of high and low. She takes everyday potato and celery root puree over the top with truffle butter and serves it with stunning seared scallops.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Chicken
programme.desc: Ina shares her kitchen tips and professional strategies for roasted chicken with radishes, from trussing the bird to carving it. Then, a delicious twist on a classic with chicken and spinach Waldorf salad. Plus, truffled chicken liver mousse.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding Now, Feeding Later
programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals Around the World
programme.desc: Ree goes around the world with 16-minute meals. First stop is India with easy mulligatawny soup for sharing with a friend. Then, for a solo meal, Thai beef with peppers. For dinner it's off to Italy for chicken picatta with lemon parsley noodles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Return to Route 66
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes an eastward tour of Route 66. In Flagstaff, Ariz., a family style restaurant serves scratch-made southwest favourites. In Chicago, a joint has been serving fried chicken on Route 66 since the 30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a beast in a remote outback river. As his investigation unfolds, Jeremy is faced with the exciting possibility that a giant predator he once thought extinct could be back.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: Deflate-Gate

programme.desc: Jeremy is enticed to travel to Australia after hearing reports of a mysterious underwater attack. As he gathers clues, the potential that the culprit could be an extinct species adds an exciting element of suspense to the case.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: How to Catch a River Monster: What Lurks Beneath

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Most Valuable Puppy
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to attend their first Puppy Bowl, but which lucky pup will represent the rescue? New parolee Spencer joins Tania on his first rescue mission. And, a couple from Florida visits VRC in search a dog to help heal their broken hearts.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Under Earl's Wing
programme.desc: A family from Chicago comes to VRC, hoping to find their first dog. Out in Assumption Parish, Tia takes in a dog that has been attacked and is near death. Earl bonds with a young Villalobos employee and tries to mentor him on how to stay out of trouble.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Finding a Hero
programme.desc: A disabled veteran and his wife come to Villalobos to find a pair of dogs to help with his depression. Marcel and Mariah race to help a puppy in need.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Connection
programme.desc: A senior dog is given a chance at a forever home. A rescue is complicated by the presence of two dogs. Later, the family discovers their personal dogs' origins when Tia surprises them with DNA test kits.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Divine Rescue
programme.desc: When former adopters return to VRC to find their dog a companion, Tia and Lizzy switch up their usual adoption procedure to get the best results. Marcel rescues a dog abandoned at a local church and is concerned that some masses could be cancer.

programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Did the Earth Move for You?

programme.title: The Parkers: A Knockout Times Two

programme.title: The Parkers: Baby, You've Got to Go

programme.title: The Parkers: Mummy's the Word
programme.desc: Halloween approaches and Kim's excited because her birthday is right around the corner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Mother of All Battles
programme.desc: An all-out war ensues between Ashley's parents and those of a girl who is harassing her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets a Job

programme.desc: When Martin wins the lottery, he spends a lot of the money before claiming his prize.

programme.title: Martin: Get a Job
programme.desc: Martin and Gina go undercover to try and discover what Tommy does for a living.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow find they always end up quarreling on their annual Valentine's Day date, this time around, Dre is determined to do everything right and keep the peace.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Dozens
programme.desc: Dre schools Andre Jr. in the art of 'playing the dozens,' trash talking someone into submission, after he's intimidated by a bully at school, but he succeeds a little too well with his plan; Diane develops a fear of the dark.

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Movie: Tremors
programme.desc: Giant worm-like predators attack a desert valley town by burrowing through the sand.

programme.title: Movie: Planet of the Apes

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek

programme.title: Futurama: Space Pilot 3000
programme.desc: A pizza delivery boy falls into a cryogenic stasis tube the on the exact moment that 1999 comes to an end. When he awakens, he finds the date is December 31st, 2999. With the help of new friends, he must adapt to life in the 31st century.

programme.title: Futurama: A Head in the Polls
programme.desc: Bender sells his body, only to have Richard Nixon's head buy it and use it to run in the election for world president. Fearing a robotic Richard Nixon as president, Leela and Fry help Bender as he tries to get his body back.

programme.title: Futurama: Where No Fan Has Gone Before
programme.desc: Fry travels to the forbidden planet Omega 3 to retrieve all 79 episodes of Star Trek.

programme.title: Futurama: Meanwhile
programme.desc: Fry asks Leela to marry him, and they face their destiny together as the Professor's latest invention alters the fabric of time .

programme.title: Futurama: The Series Has Landed
programme.desc: It is Fry's first visit to the moon, but he is surprised to find out that it is a cheesy amusement park. Meanwhile, Bender finds robot romance.

programme.title: Futurama: I, Roommate
programme.desc: Fry is such a slob that he is forced to move out of the Planet Express offices. Fry and Bender attempt to share an apartment, but they become an odd couple.

programme.title: Who Won the Year?
programme.desc: SYFY WIRE host Jackie Jennings breaks down and revisits the biggest geeky moments of 2019.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek
programme.desc: A Romulan, Nero, travels through time searching for Ambassador Spock. Romulus is destroyed in the future and Nero holds Spock responsible. His vengeance brings him to the time of Kirk and Spock's youth where they are still in Starfleet Academy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Chris and Ruth Miller are frightened to realize their daughter is missing from her bedroom. Although they cannot physically see her, they can hear her cries for help and contact a physicist friend, Bill.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Person or Persons Unknown
programme.desc: After a night of heavy drinking David Gurney awakens to the frightening realization that his wife has no idea who he is. As it turns out, no one has a recollection of who David is and he's slammed in a mental institution.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: A mysterious man arrives in a Mexican village where he creates uproar among the superstitious citizens. The town doctor and a little boy are the only ones who don't see him as a threat and upset an angry mob.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: Astronauts stumble upon a planet of tiny people who revere one of the men as a god.

programme.title: Manifest: Pilot
programme.desc: Returning to New York from a family vacation, the Stone family is separated when some of them are bumped to a later flight and, upon landing, realize that more than five years have passed. They attempt to make sense of this mystifying phenomenon.

programme.title: Manifest: Reentry
programme.desc: The passengers from Flight 828 find themselves under government scrutiny as they struggle to resume their lives. Cal is approached by an obsessive stranger, and Grace and Olive disagree about revealing a devastating secret.

programme.title: Manifest: Turbulence
programme.desc: Ben and Michaela investigate a shocking murder fearing it's connected to Flight 828. Ben struggles to accept the life his wife Grace led in his absence. Olive and Cal realize that being twins after five and a half years apart is harder than they thought.

programme.title: Manifest: Unclaimed Baggage
programme.desc: A mysterious message leads Saanvi to the flight attendant of 828 and to enlist Ben's help in uncovering a secret about the plane. Michaela questions the nature of the callings when one goes horribly awry, leaving Jared to suffer the consequences.

programme.title: Manifest: Connecting Flights
programme.desc: Stories unfold for those left behind in the aftermath of Flight 828's disappearance. In the present, Cal takes Ben on a mysterious adventure that awakens Ben to his son's perplexing abilities. Michaela tries to protect Jared from consequences at work.

programme.title: Manifest: Off Radar
programme.desc: When Cal wakes with a life-threatening fever, Grace worries it's caused by his cancer treatment. Michaela and Ben suspect Cal's condition may be related to a mysterious Flight 828 passenger. Ben and Michaela try to track down the now-missing passenger.

programme.title: Manifest: S.N.A.F.U.
programme.desc: The detained passengers are secretly moved and subjected to painful experimentation. With Cal's health directly linked to them, Ben takes advantage of an old friend to find out where the passengers were taken.

programme.title: Manifest: Point of No Return
programme.desc: Ben and Vance race to locate the missing passengers of Flight 828. Michaela helps a suicidal passenger who believes he is the Angel of Death. Cal goes back to school, navigating his unwanted celebrity and former friends who are all now 16 years old.

programme.title: Manifest: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: When Ben and Michaela put everything on the line to save the other missing passengers, the mission goes horribly awry and not everyone makes it out alive. The devastating result pushes Ben and Grace to the brink while pulling Michaela and Jared together.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Roof-raising Race for Space
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan are back in Chicago's Bucktown neighbourhood, where they find a Civil War-era house on a corner lot with only 1,200 square feet of living space.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Thrifty vs. Glitzy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Doll House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner in Garden Grove, California, about a house they want to quickly sell off the market. The house needs a lot of work, and has strange rooms everywhere that could spell disaster when trying to get permits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a listing for a small home near the beach in Costa Mesa, California. The home is in rough shape and will require a lot of work to renovate, but it's in a desirable and eclectic neighborhood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Family Friendly Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina receive a call from their long-time friend, Carlos, who is deciding whether to sell his family's home or to try flipping it. It's a tall order for a novice flipper, but with Tarek and Christina's help he may get a higher sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Backyard Staycation
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Riverside, California, with a massive backyard. It has great views and room to create a pool and outdoor living area fit for a five-star resort.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beachside Beauty
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just miles from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Additional Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, CA, with tons of potential. To justify their investment, they decide to add a bedroom and bath.

programme.desc: A family is anxious to turn their dark, closed off kitchen into an open concept living space with plenty of upgrades.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Fish Out of Water

programme.title: Mom: Jail Jail and Japanese Porn

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich

programme.title: Black-ish: Things Were Different Then

programme.desc: Spanish song about llamas is followed by a man with a tape recorder up his nose.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus: The Light Entertainment War
programme.desc: Sketches include: officers at an RAF station in 1944; a court martial scene in which the judge sings a silly song and makes everyone wear silly hats; and TV programmers making decisions based on the idiocy of the viewing public.

programme.title: Doctor Who: New Earth
programme.desc: The Doctor and Rose board the Tardis for new adventures in time and space. But when they visit mankind's new home in the future, they find gruesome secrets hidden inside a luxury hospital. Meanwhile, Cassandra is out for revenge.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tooth and Claw
programme.desc: The Doctor and Rose have to protect Queen Victoria from the Empire of the Wolf.

programme.title: Doctor Who: School Reunion
programme.desc: The Doctor investigates a contemporary London school which is being haunted by strange, bat-like creatures at night. While at the school, he meets an old friend and Rose discovers the legacy of being a Time Lord's companion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl in the Fireplace
programme.desc: Madame de Pompadour's dreams are being haunted by a stranger called the Doctor. When she finds the court of Versailles under attack from clockwork droids she tries to summon her mysterious Doctor to save the day.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Rise of the Cybermen
programme.desc: When the Doctor, Rose and Mickey head back to 2006 because of a TARDIS malfunction, they soon realize the planet they once called home is run by a fascist society and that the Cybermen may be planning an invasion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Age of Steel
programme.desc: The Cybermen take control of London and start converting the populace. While Jackie falls under Lumic's control, the Doctor, Rose and Mickey are reduced to fugitives in a world of terror.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Idiot's Lantern
programme.desc: It is 1953, the Coronation year of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, and the people of Great Britain huddle around to witness the great event. Behind the celebrations, there are rumours of monsters on the streets and Mr. Magpie is hiding an alien secret.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Impossible Planet
programme.desc: Rose finds herself further away from home than ever before, in the orbit of a Black Hole. Trapped with an Earth expedition and the mysterious Ood, the time-travellers face an even greater danger as something ancient beneath the surface begins to awake.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Satan Pit
programme.desc: Rose battles the murderous Ood and the Doctor finds his every belief being challenged to the core when the Pit beckons. With the planet threatening to fall into the Black Hole, the Doctor must make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Deep Woods Standoff

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Nazis on the Moon
programme.desc: A Russian probe discovers something has disturbed the lunar soil before the US or the USSR got there.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon that Disappeared
programme.desc: Recently discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. A Soyuz capsule carrying NASA astronaut Peggy Whitson back to Earth vanishes without explanation.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call
programme.desc: Homicide detectives Thompson and Pence are called out to a bloody crime scene. A local tenant knows the victim, but claims to have no knowledge of the murder.
