programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Rough Diamond
programme.desc: A couple's robbing spree to buy drugs turns into a murder spree when the body count adds up.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: The Dark Krystal
programme.desc: When troubled teen Krystal Hall develops a meth addiction, she teams up with meth maniac Patrick Connelly. The duo can't get enough of each other and soon launch a murderous rampage.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Slice of Murder
programme.desc: A homicidal manager with a pizza chain unleashes a reign of terror and murder accompanied by his twisted new girlfriend who entices fresh victims.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Dante's Inferno
programme.desc: Drug dealer Donte Hall and his identical twin Dante are the masterminds of the robbery at a bachelor party where two men were killed. Police struggle to find them before another death results.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Venus Guy Trap
programme.desc: Beautiful nursing student Taiana Matheny falls for rising rap star Terry Sellers. With Taiana as their irresistible bait, their hot and heavy drug-fueled romance turns their romantic getaway into a murderous crime spree.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Wheels of Steel
programme.desc: Two twisted friends will stop at nothing to steal nurse Sandra Stotler's flashy cars. They shoot her and dump the body in a lake, but plan to kill again to get their hands on her second vehicle.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling with Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Nicole finds her home in Minnesota to be flooded from burst pipes due to the extreme cold. She and her crew try to discover where all they leak are located in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Liberty Trust Building
programme.desc: Robert and the team take on the old Liberty Trust Building in downtown Roanoke, VA. After salvaging a few vintage bathrooms, they remove two stately vault doors. Later, the team heads back to the shop to create a wedding present for Grayson's big day.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Taylor Family Farm
programme.desc: Picking through old farm land and former Native American settlement, the crew find several treasures to load up and take back to Roanoke. Mike and Tay build a freight cart couch in the shop and Robert gets excited about a corn sheller.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Liberty Trust Building

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Miami Flip: It's Raining Ants!
programme.desc: Carolina's new flip is on a tight schedule, so she wastes no time getting to work, gutting out bathrooms and ripping up smelly carpet. But just as quickly as work starts, everything comes to halt when an infestation of ants is uncovered.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Cranky Construction
programme.desc: Friends Kim and Marissa jump into their first flip but soon realize that they may not have enough construction experience to complete the project on their own. As renovations go awry, the duo realizes they are in over their heads.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Dancing on the Drop Ceiling
programme.desc: When Daniel accidentally wins a dilapidated house in an auction, he and his pregnant wife Katie must rush to finish the house before their baby's due date. However with multiple delays and a lack of experience, the chances get slimmer as the days go by.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: In the Trenches
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife team goes way over on schedule and budget when permit applications with the city don't go as expected. Finding themselves at a standstill with what work they can accomplish, the wife starts to worry this flip will never end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Quick Flip or Slow Drip?
programme.desc: A competitive couple's project starts strong but unforeseen plumbing issues lead to a near flood in the basement, causing the panicked couple to question if they can pull through at all.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Rotten Flip
programme.desc: A young couple discovers pest damage while flipping a four-bedroom bungalow in the seaside town of Newport, North Carolina. Fixing the rot is a major hit to their budget and adds to their never-ending list of projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Besties on a Budget
programme.desc: Two best friends flipping a house in Amherst, NY, struggle to complete renovation projects themselves due to lack of experience. Failed project after failed project leaves one looing to the pros.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Rebuilder's Remorse
programme.desc: A husband recruits the help of his wife to flip their first home in Grand Forks, ND. She loves demo but things get tricky when it comes time for rebuild. He realizes he might not have the best partner to navigate the waters of the rebuild process.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Praying for An Easy Flip
programme.desc: Two pastors at the same church flip a house in Muskegon, MI. One has prior renovation experience and is confident he can lead the charge while the other is hoping to learn new skills along the way.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Be sure to finish all your veggies because we've got the scoop on the best desserts around. Ted Allen, Alton Brown, Giada De Laurentiis and Bobby Flay are sharing their favorite sinful sweets.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Austin can get sweltering hot but they have plenty of delicious options to keep you cool. At Cow Tipping Creamery, Corey Sorensen is making stackers, her layered version of a sundae.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Skyway Robbery / A Doggone Adventure
programme.desc: Sylvester Slapdash, disguised as the "Costumed Bandit," plots to rob the Bulldog Café. Butch must rescue his new friend, Honey, the golden doodle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Teacher Goes Ninja/ Robot Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Night Ninja kidnaps the kids' teacher; the PJs try to fix a damaged Robot.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Blame It on the Train, Owlette/ Catboy's Cloudy Crisis
programme.desc: When the new Fairground Flyer Train goes missing, Owlette is determined to get it back. Catboy must save the summer from Luna Girl, but he’ll have to get over his fear of water.

programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.desc: DanTDM and friends try not to rage quit while playing one of the hardest games in the world.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Breakout
programme.desc: Kaz and Norath try to help their friends while being pursued by a deadly bounty hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Surprise!/ Amore Motore
Mickey Mouse Shorts: A Flower for Minnie/ Mickey Monkey/ Al Rojo Vivo
Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.title: Movie: Catfish

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit

programme.title: Movie: Moulin Rouge!
programme.desc: A popular courtesan working at the Moulin Rouge falls in love with a poet in 1899 Paris.

programme.title: Movie: American Son

programme.title: Movie: Madison

programme.title: Movie: Evening

programme.title: Movie: The Object of My Affection

programme.title: Movie: The Manchurian Candidate

programme.title: Movie: The Favourite

programme.title: Movie: Getaway
programme.desc: When his wife gets kidnapped, an ex-racecar driver steals a car and drags the car's owner into a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Movie: Spotlight
programme.desc: The Boston Globe's 'Spotlight' team delves into allegations of sexual abuse perpetrated by Catholic priests in their own city.

programme.title: Movie: Girl, Interrupted

programme.title: Shameless: Debbie Might Be a Prostitute

programme.title: Movie: Green Book
programme.desc: An acclaimed black pianist hires a white man to be his driver and bodyguard for his tour of the Jim Crow south, and as they set out for the long trip they realize that they have nothing in common, but as the trip goes on they forge a strong bond.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: LA Times
programme.desc: Dani is forced to get involved in Bette's personal life, Shane grapples with a big decision, Alice is profiled by a newspaper, Sophie worries that Dani is pulling back and Finley struggles with her growing feelings for Rebecca.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 161, 153, 137, 122, 106, 105, 104, 102 (We're Still Counting Almonds)
programme.desc: Abby navigates public restrooms as a gender non-conforming queer dyke with OCD and pinballs against a cross section of humanity and perspectives at a Dolly Parton concert.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: The Transfer Agent

programme.title: Movie: Drive Angry

programme.desc: A fabled warrior must save a kingdom that is being terrorized by a monster and its mother.

programme.desc: Following his master's death, a squire enters a jousting competition in medieval England.

programme.desc: It's Pinkalicious' turn to take home the class pet, Squeakykins. But poor Squeakykins looks so bored. Pinkalicious and Peter build her a giant maze so big that Squeakykins gets lost.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Turn on the Northern Lights/ Fiddlesticks
programme.desc: Trini confesses that she's never seen the Northern Lights, Molly makes it her mission to show them to her. After an awesome jig dance at the Tribal Hall, Molly can't wait for her fiddle lessons with Oscar to start.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Boomin' Boomerang/ House Music
programme.desc: Carmen's confidence comes whizzing back at an Australian boomerang competition in Sydney, and Andy finds the opera house to be an architectural wonder when he tries to hear a performance of his new favourite song.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: Things That Go Bump/ Sherlock Bones
programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: This Old House: Westerly/ Tanks for the Propane
programme.desc: The new propane tank gets buried in the yard. Norm advises an apprentice in composite decking. Jeff and Tom add final touches to the coffered ceiling. A shelving system goes into the new office. Outside Mark applies a stone veneer to the new chimney.

programme.title: Ask This Old House: Polybutylene, Squeaky Door
programme.desc: Ross and Richard discuss indoor air quality, what it is, and how to measure it; Richard travels to Richmond, Virginia to help a homeowner replace her polybutylene piping with conventional PEX; the team shares more Home Inspection Nightmare.

programme.title: Woodsmith Shop: Simple Shop Storage
programme.desc: A simple storage shelf great for a workshop, or garage.

programme.title: Motorweek
programme.desc: This episode features: '20 Chevrolet Silverado 2500, Fred Weber tire tracks, BMW X6 and the '20 Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Ciao Italia: Mimosa Cake/ Torta Mimosa
programme.desc: Mary Ann Esposito demonstrates how to make simple and delicious Italian dishes.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen: Restaurant's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lidia Bastianich conjures simple, seasonal and economical dishes with love.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen From Cook's Illustrated: The Perfect Cookie
programme.desc: Cookie tips and recipes include an easy sugar cookie recipe, parchment paper top picks, silicone baking mats and lemon bars.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table: Los Mochis, Street Taco Favorites
programme.desc: Pati heads to Los Mochis, a coastal city in the northern region of Sinaloa. Pati returns to her kitchen to create two mouth-watering taco recipes that take her right back to those street stands in Los Mochis.

programme.title: The Jazzy Vegetarian: Gluten-Free Breakfast Menu
programme.desc: Amazing banana-oat pancakes, maple roasted portobello 'bacon' and no-egg tofu scramble are served.

programme.title: Best of the Joy of Painting: Balmy Beach
programme.desc: The late Bob Ross instructs the painting hobbyist while offering words of encouragement.

programme.title: Painting With Paulson: Jug and Oranges
programme.desc: Join Buck Paulson to learn tips and techniques to help you paint like a pro.

programme.title: Best of Sewing With Nancy: Change Up Patchwork
programme.desc: Learn to make a Square Within a Square block the traditional way; then change the mix, varying the length of the fabric pieces to stitch a Rectangle Within a Rectangle and a modern Floating Square block.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Misleader
programme.desc: The daughter-in-law of a prominent religious educator is found murdered in her hotel room.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chat Room
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl claims she was sexually assaulted, Stabler and Benson look at Internet porn to search for the suspect.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan reunites with all of the families converging at home for Father's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Stereotypical Day
programme.desc: Jay does not want to give the new family moving in across the street the wrong impression and goes out of his way to make sure they know he is the best kind of neighbour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blindsided
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts are going head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is running for senior class president against Manny. Meanwhile, Cam finds his star football player is moving away and makes a rash decision.

programme.title: Modern Family: Weathering Heights
programme.desc: Phil can't cover up his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate news segment for the local news. The day gets even better after meeting his 'weatherman' hero, Rainer Shine.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: Luke’s Halloween party isn’t the monster bash he dreamed of, and he is at risk of having the worst party of the year.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thanksgiving Jamboree
programme.desc: It's going to be a Thanksgiving jamboree at the Pritchett-Tucker home this year, and Cameron has spared no expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Alliance
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teen daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected. Meanwhile, Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snow Ball
programme.desc: When Manny and Luke put on the school's lavish winter dance and end up over their heads due to a texting error, it is up to them to fix it before the end of the night.

programme.title: Modern Family: Ringmaster Keifth
programme.desc: Phil's dad, Frank, arrives with his new girlfriend, who happens to be Phil's childhood babysitter, which sets him on a confusing tailspin. Finally, Gloria and Jay have to decide who should take care of little Joe if something should ever happen to them.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sarge and Pea
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious Lily moment during her recent dance recital. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do You Believe in Magic?
programme.desc: Fearful that the romance between him and Claire is fizzling, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentine’s Day back on track. Jay and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do It Yourself
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful do-it-yourself project, Phil convinces Jay to co-invest in a property he has always wanted to develop.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heavy Is the Head
programme.desc: Despite their hopes, Phil and Jay's property investment might turn out to be a bust, forcing Phil to rethink his original dream. Meanwhile, Cam lands in the hospital due to a head injury and refuses to have an MRI thanks to a traumatic childhood incident.

programme.title: Dare Me: Coup D'État
programme.desc: The arrival of the starry new cheer coach Colette French threatens Addy and Beth's tight bond.

programme.desc: Faye overstays her welcome after her house floods. Chase flirts with disaster when helping Savannah.

programme.title: Dateline: The Shadow

programme.title: Movie: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: A high school student decides to take the day off school and enjoy it with his friends.

programme.title: Bones: The Finger in the Nest
programme.desc: Booth's son finds a severed corpse finger in a bird's nest that leads to the discovery of a veterinarian's body. When the victim's fatal injuries are found to be from a dog, the team uncovers an illegal dog-fighting ring.

programme.title: Bones: The Perfect Pieces in the Purple Pond
programme.desc: When a shocked teenager finds a dismembered body lying in pieces in a strange purple pool of water, Brennan and Booth come to the scene only to find the victim's head is missing. The team discovers the body is that of a man with severe OCD.

programme.title: Bones: The Crank in the Shaft
programme.desc: When the remains of a much-disliked company office manager are found in a building elevator shaft, Booth and Brennan must find out which one of the employees had reason to murder the victim.

programme.title: Bones: The He in the She
programme.desc: Skeletal remains are found in the Chesapeake Bay. Only the upper torso of the victim is intact and the team has little to work from besides the victim's breast implants. The lower half of the torso is found and the team's assumptions are proved wrong.

programme.title: Movie: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: A young man and woman follow instructions from a mysterious caller who threatens their lives, and their families' lives.

programme.title: Movie: Red 2
programme.desc: A team of retired C.I.A operatives reunite in an attempt to track down a nuclear device that has gone missing.

programme.title: Arrow: The Return
programme.desc: Malcolm puts Oliver and Thea in a dangerous situation that lands them on Lian Yu with Oliver's former enemy, Deathstroke. A flashback reveals when Oliver and Maseo returned to Starling City to retrieve the Omega bio weapon.

programme.title: Arrow: Nanda Parbat
programme.desc: Malcolm is captured and taken to Nanda Parbat. Ray is obsessed with finishing the Atom suit so he can save the city, but Felicity fears he is heading down the same path as Oliver.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Touched by the Sun
programme.desc: When a female combat pilot and navy hero dies in an air-show plane crash, the team must investigate if it's the fault of the pilot or the new jet that was just approved to deploy to bases globally.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: I Do
programme.desc: The team must determine why a murdered navy drone pilot was using a black market drone to obtain military surveillance and whether the drone's footage is linked to his death.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Foreign Affairs
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride is sent a partner from the Australian Defence Force Investigation Service, Special Agent Naomi Parsons, after an Australian Royal Navy lieutenant, who was key to international negotiations on nuclear weapons, is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: Movie: Contraband
programme.desc: A former smuggler travels to Panama to get counterfeit bills in order to protect his brother from a drug lord.

programme.desc: A San Diego police officer gets teamed up with a German shepherd to crack a drug case.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood

programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After his marriage to Aaliyah is annulled, R. Kelly continues to soar on top of the charts. A talented choreographer becomes the new Mrs. Kelly in a secret ceremony.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Sex Tape Scandal
programme.desc: As journalists uncover a trail of lawsuits and confidential settlements concerning underage girls, an underground sex tape emerges that puts R. Kelly in a compromising position.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: The People vs. R. Kelly
programme.desc: R. Kelly goes to trial in Chicago on multiple counts of child pornography for his alleged participation in a sex tape involving a minor.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: All the Missing Girls
programme.desc: Parents of girls in R. Kelly's camp accuse him of keeping them psychologically and sexually imprisoned. One mother fights to get her daughter back, and wins.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Black Girls Matter
programme.desc: As other major public figures fall from grace, women's groups come forward to take aim against the sexually brazen superstar. R. Kelly's time may finally be up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Killer Cookout
programme.desc: When police arrive on the scene of a barbeque turned bloodbath, they begin to unravel a neighborhood feud that pushed one man to the point of no return.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Washplant Wars
programme.desc: Rick races to get Monster Red running after losing his only way to mine gold. A dangerous storm shuts down Parker's operation. The Beets family push to get Monica's potentially gold-rich cut up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Time For Redemption
programme.desc: Tensions rise when Parker introduces a new crewmember and a radical plan. The Beets run a crucial test that could make or break the season. Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury and Fred decodes a gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: When The Levee Breaks
programme.desc: Rick's season hangs in the balance when an engineering disaster shuts him down. Parker sinks a ton of money into a new claim. Tony gets a third operation running. Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Rise of the Machines
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Rick tries to outsmart a vital piece of equipment that has a mind of its own. Parker hopes to get more gold by splurging on a brand new toy. The Beets try to turn around the season by bringing in a hired gun.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Million-Dollar Pay Day
programme.desc: Parker gambles big and splits his crew in search of a massive score. Rick calls in a mining legend to save his season. The Beets move heaven and earth to get all three kids bringing in gold.

programme.title: The Volcano That Stopped the World
programme.desc: When the Icelandic volcano began erupting on April 14, 2010, the plumes of ash disrupted air traffic worldwide.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Monuments, Mountains and Monsters
programme.desc: From the jungles of Mexico's Yucatan peninsula to the ruins of the Trojan battlefield in Turkey, Josh Gates weaves the tales and tells the secrets of the world's most legendary locations.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Take Your Momma Fishing Day on Lake Okeechobee
programme.desc: Scott and his mother go to Lake Okeechobee to catch big bluegill and largemouth bass.

programme.title: The Experience: Trace Adkins Country Music Artist Michael Heck - Hero
programme.desc: Trace Adkins joins to surprise ranger CSM Michael Heck after being hit by a 300#IED.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Back From the Dead
programme.desc: From the castle that inspired the home of an iconic vampire to the market where Santa's devilish sidekick stalks and scares holiday revelers, Josh Gates tells the stories of places where legends never die.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Pine Island Slam
programme.desc: Blair and Capt. Eric Wrenn fishes for snook, redfish and speckled seatrout at Pine Island Sound on Florida's Southwest coast.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Ice Fishing for Green Lake, Lake Trout
programme.desc: Gary and Chase Parson are joined by Korey Sprengel and Justin Kohn to ice fish at Green Lake near Princeton, WI.

programme.title: Pet Tales With Greta
programme.desc: Great Van Susteren interviews celebrities and their pets.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Rules of the Hunt
programme.desc: Dusty and his team of expert snake hunters expose the five unwritten rules of python hunting and look ahead to the bigger stakes and bolder snakes in their future.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Wrangler
programme.desc: Mike Rowe travels to Texas and joins forces with a local snake farm that is dedicated to raising some of the biggest and most dangerous snakes in the world. It's a dirty job that has Mike scared for his life as he moves giant and at times angry snakes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Billboard Installer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe teams up with an outdoor advertising company in Texas that teaches the tricks of a very dirty trade.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Spray Insulation Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty with a team of airport runway painters, examines dirty diapers for bad smells and then teams up with a group of spray insulation technicians that get dirty to keep our houses warm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mosquito Control Officer
programme.desc: Mike has got his work cut out for him as he begins gutting mold infested houses and exterminating disease ridden rats and mosquitos. Mike gets dirty helping New Orleans locals restore, rebuild and revive their city in the aftermath of Katrina's wrath.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reef Ball Maker
programme.desc: Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty in order to help create an artificial underwater reef. It's a dirty job that is helping to revitalize fish and coral populations in areas that have been devastated by pollution.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Don't Have a Choice
programme.desc: Anna reveals big news to her family. Angela fights for Michael's visa. Syngin needs more from Tania. Mike has tough questions for Natalie. Betsy grills Sasha about his past. Anny cries shopping for a wedding dress. Blake's mom tries to bond with Jasmin.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: John and Lonnie's Story
programme.desc: John and Lonnie are two brothers from opposite ends of the spectrum. For years estranged, the brothers are now brought together by a common need to lose weight while they still can.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: John and Lonnie's Story
programme.desc: John and Lonnie are two brothers from opposite ends of the spectrum. For years estranged, the brothers are now brought together by a common need to lose weight while they still can.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Prom
programme.desc: Host Monte Durham, designer Betsey Johnson and Seventeen Magazine's Aya Kanai come together to help 50 deserving Los Angeles high school students' prom dreams come true. It's a day filled with style, newfound confidence and huge surprises!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Minnesota
programme.desc: Nicole has flown in from Minnesota with her family to go shopping at the salon. Isabel is looking for a classic gown that has an Audrey Hepburn feel to it. 8-months pregnant, Michelle visits alterations to make sure the dress fits her belly.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating New Jersey
programme.desc: Sarah bought a dress over a year ago and recently decided that she hates it. Meghan's wedding is in two weeks and is panicking at the fitting because she doesn't recognize her dress. Jessica is challenged by Kelly who's not familiar with dress shopping.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating North Carolina
programme.desc: Erin and her crew drove ten hours from North Carolina. Susan is looking for an elaborate ballgown with Randy. Cally wants her dress painted on her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Women come from all over the country for Kleinfeld's famous sample sale where they can buy gorgeous gowns at rock bottom prices. These brides have just 3 hours to sort through hundreds of designer options in the quest to find their dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating California
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Illinois
programme.desc: Patti Ann travels from Chicago to find the perfect dress for her destination wedding in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Florida
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye to eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channeling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating New York
programme.desc: Joey has tried on over one-hundred dresses at other stores. Kristal, who is wedding dress shopping for the first time, is distracted by a tiara she asks to try on. Adrianna is nervous during her fitting because her dress wasn't love at first site.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Louisiana
programme.desc: Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ballgown. Fitting bride Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Nebraska
programme.desc: Ashley, former Miss New Jersey, is desperate for a dress that puts her pageant days behind her even if her family isn't! Rodeo queen Becky wants a gown with bling. Having tried over 100 dresses, Melissa desires something to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Kentucky
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't know that her boyfriend has set up the appointment so he can propose to her. Julie has traveled to the salon with, fiancé, Anthony because he has his eye on special pink dress. Pam, a Canadian cop, brings her fiancé to find a suit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Virginia
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, Honeymoon in Vegas. Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Missouri
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Alaska
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18-lbs, Danielle worries her gown will not show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Mississippi
programme.desc: Fashion consultants help brides-to-be find the perfect dress for their wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Delaware
programme.desc: Kate is a Miss Delaware and she's at the salon with an entourage that includes her father, Mark, the 'ultimate Pageant dad.' Leah's dad, Richard, can't attend because he's a quadriplegic. Nancy has arrived in alterations with her fashionista father.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Celebrating Maryland

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: James Davis
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: James Davis
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: Knuckles and Knockers

programme.title: Botched: Totally Waist-ed
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a man who just wants his ears back, and Dr. Dubrow hopes to fix a botched butt implant. Afterward, the doctors meet with a woman who has had 17 surgeries to look like the perfect pixie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.
