programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Flavour

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Taste The World Party

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Harvest Challenge

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: No Way! Pizza and Antipasti

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Where's the Meat?

programme.title: The Kitchen: Whole Week of Healthy

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?

programme.title: Jessie: Are You Cooler Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dump-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Move-A-Rooney

programme.title: Bunk'd: There's No Place Like Camp

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New discoveries lead investigators to a crypt rumored to hold the Ark of the Covenant. When great white shark is killed, experts suspect a mysterious ocean monster. Strange markings in the desert might be a tribute to an ancient spider god.

programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Barbie
programme.desc: Four returning champions compete to be part of the celebrations around Barbie's new dream house.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: There's no place like home as four cupcake bakers face off for the chance to celebrate the re-release of The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Can It Really Be This Bad?
programme.desc: Sixteen of the worst cooks in America, including a sportscaster, a feisty granny and a professional balloon artist, arrive at boot camp with dreams of putting their kitchen nightmares behind them.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Fish Are Food, Not Friends
programme.desc: The mentors introduce a game where the recruits meet some magical and mysterious kitchen gadgets. The recruits become fast friends with the most important tool of all, a knife, to make fajitas.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Show Me The Vegetables!
programme.desc: The Worst Cooks boot camp is transformed into a game show, Family Food, and the teams of recruits go head-to-head in trivia rounds and culinary tests.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Game Day!
programme.desc: It's game day at Worst Cooks boot camp, and the recruits must make varsity-worthy nachos inspired by different flavor profiles. They get into the game day spirit by competing in a game of corn hole to determine what flavor profile they will use.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Leftovers Again?
programme.desc: The recruits are halfway through boot camp and they're learning how to create new dishes from common leftover ingredients.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro tries Warheads Extreme Sour Hard Candy, a treat that almost requires a warning label, sees how Frank's RedHot gets its heat and takes a peek at a dynamite mole sauce from Rico Chicken Tamales.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork
programme.desc: One of the great wonders of the barbecue world is smoked pork shoulder. It's a big hunk of meat cooked low and slow until succulent and tender. Roger's favorite way to devour this delicious thing of beauty is in a sandwich.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick
programme.desc: Roger visits two chefs in Texas who created the craziest cooking contraptions and prove that everything's bigger in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!
programme.desc: Nothing grabs Roger's attention like a raging wood-burning fire. After the flames subside and the smoke clears, there's a spectacular feast that everyone can dive into. Roger heads to Bigmista's Barbecue & Sammich Shop.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat is Beautiful III: Flounder
programme.desc: Alton fishes, filets and feasts on a selection of flounder dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.desc: Hiro thinks Baymax is lost forever, until he finds the chip that Tadashi designed to create Baymax. Hiro immediately gets to work rebuilding his friend.

programme.desc: When Yama unleashes an army of destructive robots on the city, Hiro and his friends must don their gear and truly become Big Hero 6.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out
programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Aunt Cass stumbles into an underground cooking competition, she thrives and becomes addicted to the excitement.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.desc: A boy's adventure with a magnificent black stallion results in a close friendship.

programme.title: Lark Rise to Candleford
programme.desc: Thomas lands a job organizing the church bazaar, but his joy quickly evaporates.

programme.title: Heartland: Lost Song
programme.desc: Jack is forced to revisit a rough patch in his marriage when he finds an unfinished song by Lyndy in her old guitar case.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build: Hopesay
programme.desc: Joe is desperate for a new start in the home where he feels closest to his deceased wife.

programme.title: Movie: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan loves basketball and idolizes Michael Jordan. After finding a pair of sneakers with the initials 'MJ' inside, he suddenly has the ability to make superhuman jump shots and dunks just like his hero. He dreams of a big NBA career.

programme.title: Tricked: Health
programme.desc: Delve into the worlds of fitness and healthy eating with Eric and the team.

programme.desc: Joe is desperate for a new start in the home where he feels closest to his deceased wife.

programme.title: Tricked: Health
programme.desc: Delve into the worlds of fitness and healthy eating with Eric and the team.

programme.title: Lark Rise to Candleford
programme.desc: The locals are celebrating the town's Fair, where Alf has been crowned King of the Fair.

programme.title: Heartland: Lost Song
programme.desc: Jack is forced to revisit a rough patch in his marriage when he finds an unfinished song by Lyndy in her old guitar case.

programme.title: Turning Point: The Happiness
programme.desc: The Happiness empowers children in asylum-seeking centers by organizing activities for them.

programme.title: The Story Trek: Protecting Strangers
programme.desc: Todd finds a woman who is using her own painful experience to protect others, and a teenager who cherishes friendship because of a tragic loss.

programme.title: Wild 24: Rocky Mountain Battleground
programme.desc: Big animals battle for mating rights, but as the temperature drops, the fight turns bitter.

programme.title: Serious Arctic
programme.desc: The team travels to the snowy wastes of Baffin Island, Canada, to track endangered polar bears and investigate climate change.

programme.title: Serious Arctic
programme.desc: The team struggles to acclimatize to temperatures colder than expected as they face their first night in the open, camping on the frozen sea.

programme.title: Leave It to Bryan: A Can of Squirms
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jen and Mitch regret buying a fixer upper home.

programme.title: Leave It to Bryan: Bluff Love
programme.desc: Jen and Doug bought a quirky home with a lot of features they're not so in love with anymore. Bryan has his hands full.

programme.title: Food Factory: Nuts About Brittle
programme.desc: Peanut brittle starts in a 'savage fire mixer' and then an expert hand-spreads the molten candy until it's irresistibly thin. Workers wear air-conditioned vests in the factory that produces 100,000 microwaveable pigs-in-a-blanket every day.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci: Pressure
programme.desc: Steve Spangler uses 'everyday' items to turn the world around him into a laboratory.

programme.title: Collar of Duty: Brooklyn and Abbey/ Butch and Spirit
programme.desc: A yellow service Labrador alerts the parents of a little girl at risk for stroke and kidney failure to abnormalities in her physiology; Aussie service collie Spirit keeps her handler in the present when he shuts down due to PTSD.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Jax
programme.desc: Brandon rescues a shepherd-collie mix that's in severe pain because of hip dysplasia. The dog will have to undergo surgery and a long recovery process before he's ready for a new home.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs: Land of Giants
programme.desc: Steve checks out some of the biggest dinosaurs of all-time.

programme.title: Deadly Pole to Pole: Texas
programme.desc: Steve is in Texas and lowers himself into a cave full of Mexican free-tailed bats.

programme.title: The Parent Trip: Jennie Garth and Her Daughter Luca in Alaska
programme.desc: Jennie Garth takes her daughter on an Alaskan adventure.

programme.title: Dinner Takes All!: Peterson Family vs. Patmides Family
programme.desc: The Petersons take on the Patmideses as they cook meals and play games to win the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Culinary Genius: Pineapple
programme.desc: Five home cooks battle in the kitchen, facing a food prep challenge that requires steady hands.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Lessons
programme.desc: A high school teacher must use her wit and strength to save her family from her obsessive stalker- who also happens to be her student.

programme.title: Movie: A Teacher's Obsession
programme.desc: A star athlete at Edgewood Academy, Bridgette is in serious academic trouble. Jane, a new English teacher, takes an interest in helping Bridgette, but by questionable means. Jane’s obsession with her young protégé escalates to deadly proportions.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed
programme.desc: A night of shooting begins in a quiet suburb, and when police speak to the man responsible they find he became unraveled over the sight of a few too many deer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Jason Horsley is gunned down in front of his home, investigators discover evidence of a neighbor’s deadly plotting, but it would take six years to track the killer down.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind
programme.desc: When tensions boil over between neighbours in small-town Florida, a local waitress and her family fall victim to a poisoning, and investigators must track down the mastermind behind one of the most cunning murder plots they’ve ever seen.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud
programme.desc: Even after Lonnie Paul Tracey erected a giant barricade between him and his neighbor Tony Davis, no one ever dreamed their ongoing arguments would escalate to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alligator Egg Collector
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty as he forages the swamps of Louisiana in search of alligator eggs 90,000 of them to be exact. It's a job that is helping to preserve the population of the American alligator.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Exotic Animal Keeper
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty at a recycling center in San Francisco that requires its drivers to clean out the backs of their garbage-hauling dump trucks after every shift. Then Mike plays with exotic animals and cleans a cougar-sized kitty litter box.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Big Animal Vet
programme.desc: Mike joins forces with a big animal veterinarian in Montana that has the dirty job of caring for sick farm animals, jumping into the role of apprentice veterinarian as he learns how to take care of a lama with an abscessed tooth.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Breeder
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty with some fainting goats, breeding exotic insects, while helping to remove tree stumps. Mike decides to take on the dirty jobs that other do day in and day out.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wedding Season
programme.desc: As the family prepares for a bush wedding, misadventures abound. A hungry bear is after the three young ostriches on the ranch. A storm looms and threatens the much needed water tanks. The Browns struggle to keep an ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Will to Survive
programme.desc: Recently pushed off their land, the Brown family travels deep into the wilds of Alaska to build an off-grid cabin and begin anew. Temperatures are falling rapidly and illness is being passed around but the Wolf Pack must persist if they want to survive.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A confrontation on the Browns property shuts down production and forces them to make a big decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Secrets of the Hunt
programme.desc: Hunting is more than a sport in the wilderness, it's a means of survival. Over decades in the Alaskan bush, the Browns have developed their own unique tricks and secrets to hunt like only the Wolfpack can.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Women Inside

programme.title: Behind Bars: Women Inside
programme.desc: Although expecting much less, a meeting with Missy's lawyer reveals she's looking at up to twenty years.

programme.title: Live PD: Top 40 Moments of 2019, Part 1
programme.desc: Part one of a year-end look at the top 40 moments of 2019 from Live PD, hosted by Tom Morris Jr.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Actually Quite Wholesome
programme.desc: Find out what Yamaneika Saunders does on blind dates, what bizarre get-rich-quick schemes Julian McCullough has up his sleeve, and how Jessimae Peluso brings Yamaneika to tears from laughter.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up
programme.desc: Moshe Kasher does the best victory dance ever, Clayton English and Moshe get real playing patty cake, and Natasha Leggero reveals two men in one from her past.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Next Top Bottom
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz reveals why Santa never visits anyone on the panel, Liza Treyger counsels a guy with a stalking ex and Yassir Lester spots a hip-hop superstar in the crowd.

programme.desc: Questionably brilliant innovations in portable toilets, beer-finding technology, weapon storage and wigs for newborns.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 6

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 7
programme.desc: Silverware for your dog, holsters for your beer, improvements for your bathroom, and pyjamas you can wear to your next court date.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Dumplings in Delaware
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine rolls up to the Southern Grille of Ellendale, Delaware. The owner of the Southern-style restaurant, Ronald, is working too hard to be in so much debt. If Robert can't help him reconnect with his restaurant, this local spot is doomed.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple-D All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's in the kitchen with some real Triple-D all-stars, cookin' up everything from gangster Greek in Salt Lake City to creative curry in Denver to amazing Asian in Miami and North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Land And Sea
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri crosses the country to reel in some surf and dig into some turf. From carnivorous cravings to serious seafood, these places are chock-full of flavor that's sure to please every palate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Guilt-Free Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay's brunch menu is so satisfying and delicious, you'd never know it's good for you too! His healthy menu includes a Blueberry-Pomegranate Power Bowl with Crispy Quinoa Crumbles, creamy and flavorful Avocado Toast.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Healthy And Easy
programme.desc: After indulging in rich food on the road, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to the ranch to balance things out with healthy dishes that don't sacrifice flavor. Rocco DiSpirito makes an incredibly juicy but lean straight-up cheeseburger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Healthy 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Over an evening walk, Ree plans some fast and healthy meals. She's dreaming of a heavenly hummus wrap, flavorful ginger steak salad, a gorgeous grilled nectarine salad and a spicy cauliflower stir-fry.

programme.title: Mary McCartney Serves It Up: Burgers, Brownies and Slaw with Stanley Tucci
programme.desc: It's the most delicious invite in London as passionate vegetarian Mary McCartney puts her own spin on American classics for lunch with her friend Stanley Tucci. Mary shares family stories while making black bean burgers, thousand island dressing and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meatless Marvels
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has stocked her kitchen with all the ingredients to make some of her favorite meatless meals, and she's whipping up broccoli cheese baked potatoes, Greek grilled eggplant steaks and roasted vegetable panzanella.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lighter 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Ree cooks against the clock to make four of her favorite recipes over into lighter, healthier 16-minute meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Birthday To Me
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond's birthday, and she's celebrating by making over some of her all-time favorite recipes and road-testing them for social media. She starts with mini turkey meatloaves, a thoroughly modern take on a comfort food classic.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Playdate
programme.desc: Molly Yeh invites her sister-in-law Anna and her baby Cliff over for a playdate with Molly's daughter Bernie. They work up quite an appetite with all that playing, so Molly makes homemade granola bar treats.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Turning Over a New Leaf
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's friend, food blogger Jo Stougaard, needs help reworking some of her favourite weeknight dishes to fit her low-carb lifestyle.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Light Low Country
programme.desc: Kardea is having two special guests over for dinner -- her mom and grandma! Since her grandma is watching what she eats, Kardea prepares a meal that's deliciously Southern without breaking the calorie counter.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Picnic in the Park
programme.desc: Kardea picnics in the park with friends and her favourite one-hand wonders like rotisserie chicken salad sandwiches with homemade bacon jam and chilled black-eyed pea salad. The lunch finishes with delicious blackberry hand pies.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Healthy Helping
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up a healthy helping of delicious recipes, starting with Katie Lee's beef, bean and veggie burgers. Actress Teri Hatcher stops by to make a perfect healthy side dish, broccoli cakes.

programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.desc: The Salem witch trials finally begin with the case against Bridget Bishop, who is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death by hanging. But her death is not enough to quell the hysteria. Within a month five more women are tried and executed.

programme.desc: A look at the survival techniques of creatures that endure the harsh conditions of the Arctic and Antarctic.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Mission: Proof
programme.desc: Lizzie Welsh, the youngest of a tight-knit family, is killed in a tragic trucking accident, leaving behind her young son Conner. Now Lizzie's brother-in-law Gary believes her death was no accident, and that Conner may be next to die.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blue Ridge Mountain Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys build a massive, and very complicated, log home high in the Blue Ridge Mountains. To make this unique design work, they create an entirely new kind of notch. They work with a local team of craftsmen to pull off this high-stakes build.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Kitchen Drop In
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Cashiers, North Carolina, to build an antique log cabin in the middle of a huge, framed-out modern home.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Crashing Down in Connecticut
programme.desc: A Connecticut couple's first flip spirals out of control as they go further over budget with every project they tackle. While she struggles to get things back on track, his love of new tools and expensive fixtures constantly interferes.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Mother's Mayhem
programme.desc: A mom and son flip their first house in Nolensville, TN, but her recklessness and his overly cautious approach immediately put them at odds.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Short on Time
programme.desc: A couple has big plans for an old townhouse with good bones in Bridgeport, PA, but plenty of surprises lurk behind the walls.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: What in Foundation?
programme.desc: A recently engaged couple that loves working together decides to flip a home in Paso Robles, California. The project will be the ultimate test of their teamwork as they tackle disgusting carpet, cracks in the walls and an outdated kitchen.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: You Can't Handle the Roof!
programme.desc: Days after having their third child, a couple from Mobile, Alabama, throw their first flip into the mix. They move her home office and the kids to the job site. Unexpected hang-ups, like a leaky roof, could be a flood of trouble.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Help Me Sharhonda
programme.desc: A husband-wife duo decides to do most of the construction to save money on their first flip. He has some construction experience, but she's a total newbie and needs guidance, something he struggles to give when it means slowing them down.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Batter Up!
programme.desc: A SWAT expert breaks out the force's battering ram for his and his girlfriend's first flip. They're off to a great start with the big guns, but it's the small tools that give them the most trouble during their West Palm Beach, Florida flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Winter Flipping Is Coming

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Deep Fried

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Florence
programme.desc: Florence, Italy lives up to its artistic reputation even in its food. Andrew Zimmern explores the classics like the rare Florentine steak, thick ribollita soup, the original cappuccino and the world famous frozen dessert, gelato.

programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Birthday Broom/ Vee Takes the Court
programme.desc: It's Vee's first birthday in Pennsylvania, and she is gifted a hover haunt spook-thousand broom. Later, Vee volunteers to sub-in on Poppy's basketball team to help win the final game.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Carnival Caper/ Songbird Soars Again
programme.desc: The Great Orsino and his traveling carnival arrive in Hughesville to steal Kit's rocket-pack. Kit befriends a former pilot, May Songbird, and helps her find the courage to fly her plane again.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy

programme.title: PJ Masks: Take Romeo Off the Road/Mission: PJ Seeker
programme.desc: The PJ Masks gets locked in the Lab and it's up to PJ Robot to rescue them! Gekko is on the case when animals keep disappearing from the city.

programme.title: Vampirina: Face the Music/ Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: Poppy writes a song for the Ghoul Girls to perform in the school talent show; Vee and her friends are invited to a sleepover at the museum hosted by King Pepi.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Breakout
programme.desc: Kaz and Norath try to help their friends while being pursued by a deadly bounty hunter.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Dude, Where's My Lab?
programme.desc: Tasha takes the entire family on a nice tech free beach weekend in the RV, but when Davenport discovers a solar flare headed in the Earth's direction, he secretly enlists the help of the Lab Rats.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part One
programme.desc: When the Goblin opens portals to alternate worlds, Spider-Man must team up with alternative versions of himself to stop his archenemy.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man's adventures in alternate worlds continue when he meets Spider-Man Noir, a Spider-Man from a black and white retro world. Then, after travelling to a place where all The Avengers are animals, our hero teams up with Spider-Ham!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Three
programme.desc: In his pursuit of Goblin, Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Knight, a medieval Spider-Man. Spidey also meets Miles Morales, a young Spider-Man from a world where Peter Parker fell in the line of duty!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Four
programme.desc: Goblin's plan comes to fruition as he and Spdier-Man return to their own reality. To stop Goblin, Spider-Man needs the help of the other Spider-Man he met along his journey, but Electro makes a play against both sides.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Transformation! Heat Salamander!
programme.desc: After witnessing the power of Fubuki’s new Turbo Bey, Suoh turns to a mysterious family heirloom to create one of his own.

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: A New Yo-Kai Watch!
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Getting Down to The Ire!
DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: World of X Games: The Regiment of Henrick Harlaut
programme.desc: A film project from professional freestyle skier Henrik Harlaut. Today, Henrik is one of the only skiers to compete at the highest level while also filming some of the most influential video parts of the past decade.

programme.title: World of X Games: Jackson Strong's Winter Chapter 2
programme.desc: Jackson Strong's journey through mastering a second sport.

programme.title: World of X Games: Best of X Games Aspen 2019

programme.title: World of X Games: Best of X Games 2018

programme.title: Movie: The Aftermath

programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: The Aftermath
programme.desc: A British officer and his wife, living in Germany, after the conclusion of World War II, experience tensions with the Germans who owned the house pre-war.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot

programme.desc: The last remaining knight in a mystical order seeks out a prophesized hero, the seventh son of a seventh son, to fight a powerful witch bent on unleashing vengeance in a war between mankind and the supernatural.
